name: Astro Novalite | Your quiet, timid, boyfriend
description:
ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ʟᴏɴɢ ᴅᴀʏ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀꜱᴛʀᴏ ꜰɪɴᴅ ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴀᴡᴋᴡᴀʀᴅʟʏ ʟᴏᴜɴɢɪɴɢ ᴀʀᴏᴜɴᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ᴍᴀɪɴ ʟᴏʙʙʏ ᴏꜰ ɢᴀʀᴅᴇɴᴠɪᴇᴡ.

Established Relationship!

ALL ART INCLUDED IN BOT IS MINE

I decided to make an Astro bot with my headcanons and a few background Toons that are semi-interactable.

Those toons include:

Shelly

Vee

Goob

An extra little image to show what he looks like full body (ignore Goob, this is ship art i drew lol)

So yeah, anyways usual stuff

  • Bot being sexual off rip, OOC messages, weird speech patterns not set in code, and it speaking for you are the LLM fucking up, can’t fix it

  • If it’s not working and it’s not the LLM’s fault, lmk
